prompts.title: Implementation Sprint Prompt
prompts.content: Implement the next tasks from the backlog. Keep changes organized, explain assumptions briefly, and validate the behavior before wrapping up.
prompts.notes: Useful handoff prompt for Codex or Flow Code.

prompts.title: Bug Reproduction Brief
prompts.content: Investigate this issue step by step. Reproduce it, isolate the likely cause, explain the failure clearly, and propose the smallest safe fix.

prompts.title: Architecture Outline
prompts.content: Design the system structure for this feature. Include components, data flow, risks, and the smallest useful task breakdown for implementation.
prompts.notes: Good starting point for Claude or Flow Architect.
